response:
Subject: Appreciation for Assistance and Clarification on FLIR FL3-U3-120S3C-C

Dear Mr. Ivan Klimkovic,

Thank you for your helpful and detailed response. I appreciate the time and effort you took to assist me.

Regarding the current machine vision system, I would like to clarify that the device in question is the FLIR FL3-U3-120S3C-C. According to the technical data attached to this email, the image sensor used on this device is the Sony IMX172, not the e2V sensor. 

I have attached the relevant technical documentation for your reference. Please review the FL3-U3-Technical-Reference PDF file, specifically page 18, for detailed specifications, and the FL3-U3-EMVA-Imaging PDF file, page 13, for information on quantum efficiency.

I will carefully study these files and manuals and will get back to you with my findings.

Thank you again for your support.

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
